overview.description: The BP p.l.c. ADRhedged (BPH) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the BP PLC Sponsored ADR index. The fund provides exposure to BP p.l.c ADR, while using swaps to hedge daily currency fluctuations. The fund aims to provide the total return performance of BP p.l.c, in its local market, to US investors. BPH was launched on Jan 3, 2025 and is issued by ADRhedged.
